since_last: 35% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.16%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.15% · BTC -1.66% · Gold -2.18% · Nasdaq100 -1.70%. 35% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.16%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.16%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.40%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +6.38%, AVAV +5.74%, SKHY +5.67%, FIX +4.12%, SMCI +4.02%. Laggards: TSLA -13.40%, GOOGL -7.02%, CRNC -5.91%, UPST -4.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.27% at $112.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
